_doc: Allowlisted peer A2A agents. To add a peer: append an object to `peers` and redeploy. Secrets are env vars referenced by `auth.secret_env`; never commit secret values here.

peers.name: Project Information Agent
peers.skill_summary: Free-form Q&A about projects in Rachel Halfaker's portfolio (CIC pipeline, community infrastructure initiatives).
good_for: Named-entity grounding — which projects in a real portfolio match a profile
Comparable-precedent lookup — what funding paths similar projects took
Coordination — which initiatives are looking for the same capital you are
do_not_ask: Public-web facts EXA can answer faster (e.g., IRS guidance, DOE program rules)
Hypothetical or generic strategy questions — this peer knows specifics, not theory
